text: Spike: evaluate references\\mattpocock-eng-skills and references\\atv-starterkit for patterns, skills, workflow surfaces, and capabilities that autoharness could incorporate to fill current gaps or augment existing functionality. Produce recommendations on what to adopt, adapt, or reject, including rationale, fit with the 10 primitives/capability-pack model, and any concrete follow-on work.

Harden verify_workspace.py to scan .autoharness/harness-manifest.yaml scalar fields (esp. autoharness_version) for unresolved {{...}} placeholders, mechanically enforcing install-harness Step 4.1 item 5. Currently the verifier only scans rendered artifacts[]; a literal {{AUTOHARNESS_VERSION}} could ship undetected. Follow-up from 054-F adversarial review.
